meta.title: Areas Served
meta.description: James M. Byrd represents clients throughout Southwest Alabama and federal courts, including Baldwin, Mobile, Escambia, and seven other counties, plus the Southern District of Alabama and more.

hero.label: Service Area
hero.title: Areas We Serve
hero.subtitle: James M. Byrd provides experienced criminal defense representation across Southwest Alabama's state courts and in federal courts throughout the region. If you are facing charges in any of these jurisdictions, call today for a consultation.

intro.text: James M. Byrd has defended clients across Southwest Alabama and federal courts since 1979.

cards.heading: Alabama Counties We Serve
cards.subheading: Mr. Byrd is licensed to practice in all Alabama state courts and appears regularly in each of the following counties.

items.title: Mobile County
items.description: James M. Byrd has been based in Mobile since 1979 and practices regularly in the Mobile County Circuit Court, District Court, and municipal courts throughout the county.

items.title: Baldwin County
items.description: Serving clients in the Baldwin County Circuit Court (28th Judicial Circuit), Baldwin County District Court, and the Bay Minette Municipal Court.

items.title: Clarke County
items.description: Representing clients in the Clarke County Circuit Court (1st Judicial Circuit), Clarke County District Court, and the Grove Hill Municipal Court.

items.title: Choctaw County
items.description: Handling cases in the Choctaw County Circuit Court (1st Judicial Circuit), Choctaw County District Court, and the Butler Municipal Court.

items.title: Escambia County
items.description: Defending clients in the Escambia County Circuit Court (21st Judicial Circuit), Escambia County District Court, and the Brewton Municipal Court.

items.title: Marengo County
items.description: Appearing in the Marengo County Circuit Court (4th Judicial Circuit), Marengo County District Court, and the Linden Municipal Court.

items.title: Monroe County
items.description: Practicing in the Monroe County Circuit Court (4th Judicial Circuit), Monroe County District Court, and the Monroeville Municipal Court.

items.title: Washington County
items.description: Representing defendants in the Washington County Circuit Court (1st Judicial Circuit), Washington County District Court, and the Chatom Municipal Court.
